data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for optional uploader identity and source channel.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of optional uploader identity and source channel, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for these attributes, yet no specific evidence is documented to demonstrate that this requirement is met, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of optional uploader identity and source channel.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
